entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop well adapted to water-limited conditions

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of grain production per plant or area

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of biomass produced to the amount of water transpired

entities.name: WATER EXTRACTION
entities.description: The capacity of the plant to extract water from the soil

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total above-ground biomass

entities.name: TERMINAL WATER STRESS
entities.description: Water limitation occurring during the grain filling stage of crop growth

entities.name: FULLY IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where water is provided without limitation

entities.name: LYSIMETRIC SYSTEM
entities.description: A system used to quantify water use and yield in plants

entities.name: MULTILINEAR REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze the relationship between multiple independent variables and a dependent variable

entities.name: DURRA RACE
entities.description: A race of sorghum characterized by high water extraction capacity and high transpiration efficiency

entities.name: CAUDATUM-BICOLOR RACE
entities.description: A race of sorghum characterized by poor water extraction capacity

entities.name: CAUDATUM-DURRA RACE
entities.description: A race of sorghum characterized by poor water extraction capacity

entities.name: CAUDATUM RACE
entities.description: A race of sorghum characterized by high transpiration efficiency

entities.name: CAUDATUM-GUINEA RACE
entities.description: A race of sorghum characterized by high transpiration efficiency

entities.name: GUINEA RACE
entities.description: A race of sorghum characterized by the lowest transpiration efficiency

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING
entities.description: The physiological stage of seed development and nutrient accumulation

entities.name: SORGHUM REFERENCE SET
entities.description: A collection of 149 germplasm entries used for studying genetic variation in sorghum
